deviations.description: The requirement threshold for outstanding debt was lowered from 100 € to 50 €, prohibiting SIM card issuance to customers with debt exceeding 50 €. The process model only restricts issuance when debt is less than 100 €, as indicated by the sequence flow labeled 'Debt < 100'. Therefore, the process allows issuance to customers with debt between 50.01 € and 100 €, which violates the stricter requirement in Version 2.
process_model_reference: sequence flow 'Debt < 100' and all subsequent SIM card issuance activities
